name: What evidence do I need if sued over AI-generated legal docs?
description: Save all AI prompts/outputs and verification records.[4]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need if sued over AI-generated legal docs?

acceptedAnswer.text: Save all AI prompts/outputs and verification records.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Preserve all prompts, outputs, edit history, and communications showing verification efforts.[4][5] Prove human oversight to mitigate liability.[2] Key factors: Discoverability scope; intent; reliance by others. Disclose to insurer/lawyer; avoid further AI use. Gather metadata on documents.
